title: Waystar (formerly Navicure) - Claims Management Platform
problem: Healthcare practices need easy-to-use claims management with real-time eligibility and denial prevention.
solution: Simplified claims management platform with real-time eligibility, claims tracking, and denial management. Focused on ease of use for small to mid-size practices.
traction_signals: Strong reputation for ease of use
Merged with ZirMed to form Waystar
varden_fit: HIGH — Navicure proved simplified RCM works for smaller practices. European practices need similar easy-to-use tools.
notes: CONTRARIAN: Simplified RCM for smaller practices is an underserved segment in Europe.
